description: Eurhynchium striatum is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae.
Homalothecium sericeum is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae.

Kindbergia praelonga, known as common feather-moss, is a species of moss belonging to the family Brachytheciaceae. It is a medium to large size moss with pinnate branches. The species is of interest for having properties that may be beneficial for human health.
Pseudoscleropodium purum, or neat feather-moss, is a species of moss and the sole representative of the genus Pseudoscleropodium.
